name: @bolusi/db-server
description: Kysely + PostgresDialect, migrations, codegen types, RLS policies, forTenant — the ONLY exported way to query tenant tables (08 §3.2, FR-1039)

scripts.db:codegen: kysely-codegen --dialect postgres --camel-case --out-file src/generated/db.ts --url ${DATABASE_URL:?run this from the repo root as 'pnpm db:codegen' — it derives this worktree's own database URL (T-14d)}
scripts.db:codegen:check: kysely-codegen --dialect postgres --camel-case --out-file src/generated/db.ts --url ${DATABASE_URL:?run this from the repo root as 'pnpm db:codegen:check' — it derives this worktree's own database URL (T-14d)} --verify
